productDisplayName: Little Miss Women Printed Magenta T-shirt
description: Composition Mullberry T-shirt made of 100% cotton , has a round neck, short sleeves, and blue and pink graphic print with shimmer on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Mashine wash inside out with similar colours in warm water Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on decorations Everthing seems better when little miss Sunshine is around. Spread the joy around you with this stylish T-shirt from Little Miss. The graphic print adds a feminine touch and the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day long. Pair it with jeans and sandals for that perfect girly look. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 26”
